PYTHON.description: Standalone Python 3.11 environment to ensure GUI and dependency compatibility.
PYTHON.purpose: Provide a consistent Python runtime for other tools.

USERINPUT.description: Tkinter-based GUI for capturing multi-line user feedback and approval.
USERINPUT.purpose: Facilitate seamless interaction between AI Agent and user. AI agent should execute this command separately, not combined with other commands, to ensure feedback is not missed.

BACKGROUND.purpose: Run tasks without blocking the agent's execution.

FILEDIALOG.description: Advanced file and directory selection via custom Tkinter GUI.
FILEDIALOG.purpose: Allow users to select local files/directories for AI processing.

TEX.description: Local LaTeX compilation and template manager.
TEX.purpose: Provide local TeX compilation and manage various journal templates.

SEARCH.description: Multi-platform search tool for web and academic papers.
SEARCH.purpose: Provide real-time search results from general search engines and academic repositories like arXiv and Google Scholar.
